extraction.one_line_summary: WILLIAMS Stephen won punchy stage 1 finale at Tour de Suisse after breakaway absorbed on final categorized climb, outsprinting Schachmann and Kron.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain isolated Williams perfectly by having Van Wilder lead out final sprint despite teammate being in late break.
BikeExchange chased with Matthews/Haig in break, revealing weak team coordination or deliberate rider preservation strategy.
Final categorized climb absorbed break with 20s gap, showing circuit's climb insufficient to thin peloton for selective finish.

rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: positive: First WT win suggests breakthrough on punchy finishes, outkicked established climber-sprinters Schachmann/Kron
rider_signals.VAN WILDER Ilan: positive: Sacrificed own result to leadout Williams despite being fresh, indicates team prioritization clarity
rider_signals.FULGSANG Jakob: neutral: Animated late break move with Higuita showed legs but tactical impact negligible
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Dropped on final categorized climb suggests poor form entering Tour prep race
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel: negative: Distanced on same climb that dropped Pinot, concerning signal for GC ambitions
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Positioned well and looked strong through finale despite no result
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Eliminated before finale on lumpy circuit, confirming steep climbs now beyond capacity
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: Same elimination as Sagan confirms pure sprinters irrelevant on this terrain
